# IAM & org policy — canon

Some content. This is important for ensuring that documentation meets organizational standards and guidelines.

This is a substantial body of text that covers the fundamentals of IAM and organizational policy management on the Google Cloud Platform. We discuss various aspects of identity and access management, policy enforcement, and organizational structures that are critical to maintaining security and compliance.

The IAM system provides a comprehensive framework for managing access to GCP resources. Service accounts, custom roles, and organizational policies work together to create a robust access control system.

## Patterns

### Public-access exemptions for GCS buckets

Body text. Here we describe patterns for managing public access to GCS buckets, including best practices for exemptions and specific use cases where public access is appropriate and necessary for delivering content.

These patterns help organizations manage their access control policies while maintaining security and compliance standards. We provide detailed guidance on when and how to apply public-access exemptions safely and effectively without compromising security posture.

### Service account key rotation

Guidelines for implementing secure service account key management practices and monitoring strategies to detect suspicious key usage patterns.
